acholi.opportunity_rover_found_hematite_blueb: Rover me Opportunity onoŋo "blueberry" me hematite — jami ma cweyo keken i pii. Cal ma a ki malo nyuto delta me kulu macon!
acholi.venus_is_hotter_462_c_vs_430_c_mercury: Venus lyet loyo (462°C ka ipimo ki 430°C)! Mercury pe tye ki yamo me mako lyeto. Greenhouse effect pire tek loyo bor.
acholi.gas_giants_have_no_solid_surface_they_: Gas giant pe tye ki wi ngom matek! Gin bedo dwoŋ me hydrogen ki helium ma doko tek mot mot cok ki cwiny. Probe donyo piny labongo agiki.
acholi.earth_s_distance_from_the_sun_doesn_t_: Bor pa Lobo ki i Ceŋ pe lokke i nino acel. Dyeceŋ nyuto ni Ceŋ tye malo loyo i polo meri. Lobo cok loyo i dwe me Januar (perihelion)!
acholi.jupiter_is_11x_wider_than_earth_and_1_: Jupiter lac tyen 11 loyo Lobo, dok Lobo 1,300 romo donyo iye! Solar system tye ki apoka-poka madit i dit.
acholi.pluto_is_still_in_the_solar_system_it_: Pluto pud tye i solar system! Gilokko nyiŋe ki i "planet" odoko "dwarf planet" i 2006, ento pud wiro i kom Ceŋ.
acholi.the_asteroid_belt_is_mostly_empty_spac: Kor asteroid dwoŋ mere obedo ka nono! Bor ma tye i kin asteroid obedo milion km. Yeya me polo kato iye labongo peko mo.
acholi.not_always_saturn_is_95x_earth_s_mass_: Pe kare ducu! Saturn pek mere tyen 95 loyo Lobo ento gravity i wi ngom obedo 1.06g keken pien dit twatwal dok pek mere nok. Pek nyo pek pa dano jenge i pek KI bor pa dyere.
acholi.all_parts_of_the_moon_receive_sunlight: Kabedo pa Dwe ducu nongo ryeny me ceŋ! "Tuŋ ma cen" obedo nucce ma wan pe watwero neno ki i Lobo pi tidal locking. Nongo ceŋ marom.
acholi.the_habitable_zone_or_goldilocks_zone_: Kabedo me kwo (onyo "Goldilocks zone") obedo bor ma ki i lakalatwe ka ma pii twero mol iye i wi ngom pa planet. I solar system megwa, Venus tye i aguu ma iye, Lobo tye i dyere, dok Mars tye i aguu ma woko. Ento me bedo ki pii ma mol imito bene yamo maber ki teko me magnet!
acholi.when_sunlight_heats_a_planet_s_surface: Ka ryeny me ceŋ tuko wi ngom pa planet, wi ngom cwalo lyeto (infrared) woko. Gas me greenhouse (CO₂, CH₄, H₂O) mwonyo lyeto man ci dwoko cen, ma tuko planet. Greenhouse pa Lobo obedo +33°C (gwoko kwo). Mega me Venus obedo +510°C (pe ki gwokke). Mars cok pe tye ki mo (-60°C i dye). Dit pa gas me greenhouse aye keto agikki!
acholi.a_planet_s_magnetic_field_creates_a_ma: Teko me magnet pa planet cweyo "magnetosphere" — gwok ma pe nen ma ryemo woko yamo me ceŋ (jami ma tye ki charge ma a ki i Ceŋ). Magnetosphere pa Lobo gwoko yamo megwa dok miyo kwo bedo. Mars orwenyo teko mere me magnet i mwaka bilion 4 mukato, ci giywayo yamo mere woko mot mot. Magnetosphere pa Jupiter tek tyen 20,000 loyo mega me Lobo!
acholi.in_2006_the_international_astronomical: I 2006, International Astronomical Union oketo lok adek ma nyuto planet: (1) Wiro i kom Ceŋ ✓, (2) Tye ki pek ma romo miyo kite doko ryeŋryeŋ ✓, (3) "Ojwayo yo mere me wir" ki jami mukene ✗. Pluto rwate kabedo mere me wir ki jami alip mapol me Kuiper Belt, mumiyo gilwoŋe ni "dwarf planet." Man pe miyo doko gin ma pe mit — New Horizons onyuto ni pud tye ka tic i kome!
acholi.over_billions_of_years_gravitational_t: I kare pa bilion mwaka, teko me kwot pa gravity twero miyo wir pa dwe doko mot nio ka orwate ki kare mere me wir madit. Agikki: tuŋ acel nyuto i planet kare ducu. Dwe megwa gimake ki Lobo (tidally locked). Mercury gimake nucce ki Ceŋ (rate me 3:2). Pluto ki Charon gimako kekengi — ginyuto tuŋ acel-lu bot kekengi kare ducu!
acholi.a_biosignature_is_any_evidence_of_past: Biosignature obedo lanyut mo keken pa kwo macon onyo ma tye kombeddi. Lupwony yenyo: (1) pii ma mol, (2) organic molecule, (3) gas i yamo calo oxygen onyo methane ma pe romo bedo ka pe kwo aye cweyo, (4) ka ma teko a ki iye. Kabedo maber loyo i solar system megwa: Mars (pii macon), Europa (nam i te del), Enceladus (yamo pii ma tuc), ki Titan (nam me methane).

acholi.coral_reefs_support_25_of_all_marine_s_2: Kidi me nam (coral reef) gwoko 25% pa lee me nam ducu kadi bed gitwomo mape romo 1% pa te nam.

acholi.there_are_an_estimated_3_million_shipw: Gitamo ni meli ma onyum tye milion 3 i te nam i lobo ducu. Mapol gidoko ka ma jami makwo pito iye.
acholi.olympus_mons_is_so_wide_624_km_that_st: Olympus Mons lac twatwal (km 624) ma ka icuŋ i aguu mere, pe inen wiye — okuko woko i ŋe aguu me neno.
acholi.it_would_stretch_from_new_york_to_los_: Bor mere onoŋo cito ki New York o i Los Angeles dok tut tyen 5 loyo Grand Canyon.
acholi.if_all_of_mars_s_polar_ice_melted_it_c: Ka pee ducu ma tye i tuŋ malo ki piny pa Mars oleŋ, twero umo planet ducu ki pii ma tut mita 11.

acholi.below_this_layer_are_ammonium_hydrosul: I te kor man tye pol me ammonium hydrosulfide, dok i tegi tye pol me pii. Jupiter tye ki polo ma tye ki kor 3.

acholi.this_metallic_hydrogen_ocean_generates: Nam me hydrogen ma nyonyo man aye cweyo teko me magnet pa Jupiter — tek tyen 20,000 loyo mega me Lobo.

Accretion disk obedo jami ma wiro ka donyo iye, ma lyeto mere o i milion degree pi gwec. Black hole ma wiro yot twero cwalo jet me relativity i kom yo ma wiro iye.
acholi.scrub_earth_years_and_watch_all_five_i: Wil mwaka me Lobo ci inen planet abic ducu ma tye iye ka wiro i yot ada. Cik me adek pa Kepler ma tye ka tic.
acholi.kepler_s_third_law_orbital_period_squa: Cik me adek pa Kepler: kare me wir ma gikwano tyen aryo ∝ bor ma gikwano tyen adek. Planet ma iye ringo; ma woko lak. Jupiter tero mwaka 12 me Lobo pi wir acel; Mercury tyeko wir mere nino 88 acel acel.
acholi.build_a_spacecraft_from_real_component: Ged yeya me polo ki jami ada. Yer cwiny, teko, propulsion + jami ma tero — ci inen pek + wel ka lokke.
acholi.the_sun_has_an_11_year_cycle_of_sunspo: Ceŋ tye ki cycle me mwaka 11 me tic pa sunspot. Wil wek inen sunspot ka bino ki ka rwenyo + cwalo pa CME.
acholi.the_sun_cycles_every_11_years_between_: Ceŋ lokke i mwaka ~11 acel acel i kin ka manok (sunspot manok, kwe) ki ka madit (sunspot mapol, solar flare + CME mapol). Cycle 25 oo malo mere i cok 2024-2025 dok kombeddi tye ka dwoko piny.
acholi.where_could_life_as_we_know_it_survive: Kwo ma wangeyo twero bedo kwene i kom lakalatwe mo keken? Lok ryeny pa lakalatwe + bor pa planet wek inen.
acholi.the_habitable_zone_is_where_surface_wa: Kabedo me kwo obedo ka ma pii i wi ngom twero bedo ma mol. Aguu ma iye: greenhouse effect tuyo pii woko. Aguu ma woko: pee mako CO2, ci ŋic pe ki gwokke. Aguu lokke kit macalo √L.
acholi.drag_the_moon_closer_to_make_earth_s_t: Ywai Dwe cok wek kwot pa Lobo odoŋ dit. Nen ni kudo tye i tuŋ aryo — ma cok ki ma bor.
acholi.earth_moon_tidal_bulge: Kudo me Kwot pa Lobo + Dwe
acholi.tides_happen_because_gravity_pulls_mor: Kwot timme pien gravity ywayo matek loyo i tuŋ ma cok ka ipimo ki tuŋ ma bor pa Lobo. Tuŋ aryo ducu kudo woko. Ceŋ ki Dwe ka gitye kacel gicweyo kwot madit (ka gicuŋ i laŋo acel) + kwot matidi (ka gicuŋ atir kekengi).
acholi.rotate_earth_and_adjust_season_watch_t: Wir Lobo ci ilok kare me mwaka. Nen kit ma laŋo ma poko dyeceŋ ki dyewor wot kwede + kit ma jengo pa kome loko tuŋ ma ceŋ ryeny iye.
acholi.five_gravitational_sweet_spots_between: Kabedo abic maber pa gravity ma tye i kin jami aryo ka ma yeya me polo twero cuŋ iye. James Webb bedo i L2.
acholi.green_stable_equilibria_l4_l5_yellow_u: Nyagilic: ma cuŋ matek (L4, L5) • Jarawa: pe cuŋ matek ento konyo (L1, L2, L3)
acholi.five_points_in_any_two_body_orbit_wher: Kabedo abic i yo me wir mo keken ma tye ki gin aryo ka ma gravity ki teko me wir gipore. Yeya me polo twero cuŋ kany ki mafuta manok. JWST bedo i L2 — kare ducu i ŋe Lobo, ka bor ki Ceŋ.
acholi.each_element_fingerprints_light_in_spe: Element acel acel tye ki lanyut mere kikome i wavelength pa ryeny. Wil i kin element wek inen kit ma lupwony me lakalatwe gingiyo kwede i lakalatwe ma bor.
acholi.element_emission_lines_fingerprint: Laŋo me ryeny pa element (lanyut mere kikome)
acholi.every_element_emits_its_own_unique_pat: Element acel acel cwalo kit me wavelength pa ryeny ma mere kikome — lanyut mere me spectral. Ka waneno ryeny ma a ki i lakalatwe ma bor, watwero ŋeyo gin ma gicweyogi kwede. Man aye omiyo wangeyo ni Ceŋ obedo hydrogen 75%!
acholi.click_constellations_to_see_their_star: Dii constellation wek inen lakalatwe megi + laŋo ma riyogi. Lakalatwe acel acel tye ki rangi mere + nyiŋe ada.
acholi.constellations_are_patterns_of_stars_t: Constellation gin kit pa lakalatwe ma dano gungeyo pi mwaka alip mapol. IAU oketo constellation 88 ma gimoko i 1922. Lakalatwe ma tye i constellation acel pol kare pe gicok kekengi ada — ginen keken calo gicok ka ineno ki i Lobo.
acholi.how_much_delta_v_travel_time_to_reach_: Delta-v ki kare me wot adi aye mite me oo i kabedo mapatpat? Yo me wir me Hohmann transfer ma ginyuto.
acholi.a_hohmann_transfer_is_the_most_fuel_ef_2: Hohmann transfer obedo yo ma tiyo ki mafuta manok loyo me wot i kin yo me wir aryo ma ryeŋryeŋ. Tiyo ki waŋ mac aryo: acel me donyo i ellipse me transfer, acel me doko ryeŋryeŋ ka doŋ oo. Δv obedo alokaloka ducu i yot ma mite.

acholi.how_much_of_a_planet_s_incoming_sunlig: Ryeny me ceŋ ma bino i planet adi aye dwokke cen ka ipimo ki ma gimwonyo? Man aye keto lyeto pa planet ducu.
acholi.albedo_fraction_of_light_reflected_ice: Albedo = nucu pa ryeny ma dwokke cen. Pee + pol dwoko ryeny mapol (albedo madit); lobo macol + pii mwonyo ryeny (albedo manok). Dwoko ryeny mapol = planet ma ŋic loyo. Man aye ice-albedo feedback ma kelo kare me pee.

Magnification ma kato cok tyen 20 pi cm acel me aperture miyo cal doko col. Mirror me JWST ma dit mita 6.5 kwano galaxy ma a ki i mia me milion mwaka mukwoŋo i ŋe Big Bang.

acholi.weather_happens_here_temperature_decre: Polo timme kany. Lyeto dok piny ka bor malo medde.
acholi.ozone_layer_absorbs_uv_temperature_inc: Kor ozone mwonyo UV. Lyeto medde ka bor malo medde.
acholi.meteors_burn_up_here_coldest_layer_90_: Meteor waŋ kany. Kor ma ŋic loyo (-90°C).
acholi.iss_orbits_here_400km_aurora_glow_very: ISS wiro kany (400km). Aurora ryeny. Yamo nok twatwal ento lyet.
acholi.boundary_to_space_air_escapes_to_space: Aguu me polo. Yamo a woko cito i polo.
acholi.galileo_s_1610_observations_venus_goes: Neno pa Galileo i 1610: Venus lokko kite. Man onyuto ni Venus wiro i kom Ceŋ, pe i kom Lobo.
acholi.galileo_s_1610_discovery_venus_has_pha: Ginoŋo pa Galileo i 1610: Venus tye ki kit calo Dwe
acholi.in_1610_galileo_observed_venus_through: I 1610 Galileo oneno Venus ki telescope mere ci oneno ni lokko kite — calo Dwe. Man obedo lanyut ni Venus wiro i kom Ceŋ, pe i kom Lobo. Kit pa Ptolemy ma keto Lobo i dyere pe romo tito Venus ma opoŋ. Lanyut madit pi tam pa Copernicus ni Ceŋ tye i dyere.
acholi.a_magnetic_field_deflects_solar_wind_p: Teko me magnet ryemo yamo me ceŋ + gwoko yamo pa planet. Mars orwenyo gin aryo ducu; mumiyo obedo tim nono.
acholi.earth_s_magnetic_field_deflects_most_s: Teko me magnet pa Lobo ryemo yamo me ceŋ mapol, ma gwoko yamo + kwo. Mars orwenyo teko mere me magnet i mwaka bilion ~4 mukato ci orwenyo yamo mere mot mot. Jupiter tye ki teko ma tek loyo i solar system.
acholi.switch_between_size_and_distance_views: Lok i kin neno me dit ki mega me bor. Pe gitwero nyuto aryo ducu i rom ada i kare acel — mano nyuto kit ma polo obedo ka nono kwede.
acholi.true_scales_are_hard_to_show_simultane: Tek me nyuto rom ada aryo ducu i kare acel. Ka Lobo obedo nyig ŋor, Ceŋ onoŋo bedo apwol madit me tuko i bor pa fut 200. Ka bor tye i rom ada, planet doko waŋ matino ma pe nen. Cal mapol poko kin aryo.
acholi.thrust_to_slow_your_descent_land_softe: Tii ki thrust me dwoko lorri mot. Lor mot loyo 2.5 m/s onyo ibinyume. Gwok mafuta — pe romo cuŋ awiya matwal.
acholi.apollo_11_nearly_ran_out_of_fuel_durin: Apollo 11 mafuta mere cok otum i kare me lor i Dwe. Neil Armstrong ojuko autopilot ki cinge me yenyo ka me lor ma opore. Olor ka mafuta ma odoŋ obedo ~cekonde 25.
acholi.pick_a_destination_see_how_long_light_: Yer kabedo + inen kare ma ryeny tero me oo iye. Ka ikato solar system, bor doko madit ma lworo dano.
acholi.future_pole_star: Lakalatwe me tuŋ acam me anyim
acholi.edge_of_observable_universe_2: Aguu pa polo ducu ma watwero neno
acholi.light_travel_expansion: Wot pa ryeny + dongo pa polo
acholi.light_moves_300_000_km_s_we_see_distan: Ryeny wot 300,000 km/s. Waneno jami ma bor kit ma gin obedo i kare ma ryeny oa ki botgi. Ceŋ ma waneno tye ki dakika 8; Proxima Centauri tye ki mwaka 4. Galaxy me Andromeda tye ki milion mwaka 2.5.
acholi.sun_path_across_latitudes: ☀ Yo pa Ceŋ i Latitude Mapatpat
acholi.where_exactly_does_the_sun_rise_set_it: Ceŋ wok dok poto kwene ada? Jenge i latitude meri + nino. Tem Maine ka ipimo ki Arctic Circle.
acholi.sun_path_depends_on_latitude_season_at: Yo pa Ceŋ jenge i latitude + kare me mwaka. I dye kor lobo, ceŋ cito atir wiye. I Arctic Circle, ceŋ tye i dye wor i solstice me oro + wor pi kare ducu i solstice me koyo. I Portland me Maine: i dye oro ceŋ tye malo; i dye koyo, ceŋ cok pe kato aguu me neno.
acholi.habitable_moons: 🌙 Dwe ka Kwo Twero Bedo iye
acholi.some_moons_may_host_life_europa_encela: Dwe mukene twero bedo ki kwo: Europa + Enceladus + Titan + Ganymede gitye ki nam i te del. Tic ma tye ka lube kombeddi yenyo.
acholi.subsurface_ocean_has_2_water_of_earth_: Nam ma tye i te del tye ki pii tyen 2 loyo nam ducu me Lobo. Hydrothermal vent twero bedo i te nam. Tic me JUICE + Europa Clipper pud tye ka lube.
acholi.cassini_discovered_geysers_spraying_wa: Cassini onoŋo geyser ma cwalo pii + organic + hydrogen + silica. Chemistry pa plume nyuto jami + teko ma twero pito kwo.
acholi.thick_atmosphere_of_n2_ch4_lakes_of_li: Yamo ma dwoŋ me N2 + CH4. Nam me methane ma pii i wi ngom. Nam me pii-ammonia tye i te. Kwo twero bedo ento pat twatwal.
acholi.largest_moon_subsurface_ocean_confirme: Dwe madit loyo. Hubble onyuto lanyut matek me nam ma tye i te del. Tic me JUICE bikwano.
acholi.oldest_visible_surface_in_solar_system: Wi ngom ma teggi loyo ma wanen i solar system. Twero bedo ki nam i te del. Radiation nok loyo mega me dwe mukene pa Jupiter.
acholi.most_volcanically_active_body_in_solar: Gin ma tye ki got mac ma tiyo loyo i solar system. Got mac 400+ ma tiyo. Yamo me sulfur dioxide. Kwo pe romo bedo iye.
acholi.what_would_it_take_to_make_mars_liveab: Gin aŋo ma mite me miyo Mars doko ka me kwo? Lok gas me greenhouse, leŋo pa pee, ki yat ma umo — ci inen Mars ka lokke.
acholi.polar_ice_melt: Leŋo pa pee i tuŋ malo ki piny
acholi.terraforming_mars_would_take_thousands: Loko Mars me doko ka me kwo tero mwaka alip mapol. Mite: dwoko yamo dit (gas me greenhouse), tuko wi ngom (leŋo pee), keto yat (oxygen). Kwan pa NASA nyuto ni CO2 ma tye i Mars kombeddi nok twatwal me loko lobo labongo kelo gin madwoŋ ki woko. Pud dwoŋ mere obedo lok me tam keken.
acholi.hubble_stared_at_an_empty_patch_of_sky: Hubble oneno kabedo ma nono i polo pi nino 10 ci onoŋo galaxy 3000 ma bor. Nen maber — nyig ma col acel acel obedo galaxy.
acholi.each_fuzzy_blob_is_a_galaxy_of_100_bil: Nyig ma col acel acel obedo galaxy ma tye ki lakalatwe milion o wa i mia me bilion
acholi.in_1995_hubble_pointed_at_a_tiny_dark_: I 1995, Hubble oneno kabedo matidi macol i polo pi nino 10. Agikki: galaxy 3000 ma bor i cal acel. JWST otero man tut loyo, ka kwano galaxy ma a ki i mia me milion mwaka mukwoŋo i ŋe Big Bang.
acholi.hotter_stars_look_bluer_cooler_stars_r: Lakalatwe ma lyet loyo nen bulu; ma ŋic loyo nen kwar. Gipoko lakalatwe ki OBAFGKM kit macalo spectral type.
acholi.red_dwarf_coolest_most_common_stars_75: Red dwarf — lakalatwe ma ŋic loyo dok pol loyo (75% pa lakalatwe ducu)
acholi.orange_dwarf_quieter_than_sun_longer_l: Orange dwarf — kwe loyo Ceŋ, kwo bor loyo
acholi.blue_hottest_rarest_stars_lifespans_on: Bulu — lakalatwe ma lyet loyo dok manok loyo, kwogi obedo milion mwaka keken
acholi.star_color_temperature_astronomy_mnemo: Rangi pa lakalatwe = lyeto. Lok me poyo wic pa lupwony me lakalatwe pi OBAFGKM (ki ma lyet loyo o i ma ŋic loyo): 'Oh Be A Fine Girl/Guy, Kiss Me.' Lakalatwe ma lyet loyo dit loyo + ryeny loyo + kwo cek loyo.
acholi.why_does_the_moon_always_show_the_same: Piŋo Dwe nyuto tuŋ acel-lu kare ducu? Teko me kwot omiyo wir mere odoko mot. Nen kit ma bor + pek loko kare me mako kwede.
acholi.tidal_forces_gradually_slow_a_moon_s_r: Teko me kwot dwoko wir pa dwe mot mot nio ka orwate ki kare mere me wir. Dwe megwa gimake matek (tidally locked): tuŋ acel-lu kare ducu i kom Lobo. Mercury tye i resonance me 3:2 ki Ceŋ (pe gimake liweŋ).
acholi.click_each_crater_real_planetary_scien: Dii bur acel acel. Lupwony ada me planet kwano bur me ŋeyo dit pa mwaka pa wi ngom — bur mapol = teggi loyo.
acholi.crater_counting_is_how_scientists_dete: Kwano bur aye yo ma lupwony giŋeyo kwede mwaka pa wi ngom pa planet. Bur mapol = wi ngom ma teggi. Got pa Dwe tye ki bur mapol (teggi twatwal); maria gin lava manyen.
acholi.mass_curves_spacetime_drag_mass_watch_: Pek kuko spacetime. Ywai pek + nen kit ma bur tut kwede. Wir apwol wek inen kit ma poto iye kwede.
acholi.einstein_s_general_relativity_says_mas: General relativity pa Einstein waco ni pek kuko spacetime. Jami pe winyo teko mo — gin lubo geodesic i kom kit ma okuk. Man aye gravity. Black hole kuko spacetime matek twatwal ma kadi ryeny pe twero a woko.
acholi.three_main_asteroid_types_c_s_m_mining: Kit me asteroid adek madongo: C, S, M. Kampany me kunyo yenyo mega me M pi nyonyo + platinum.
acholi.most_common_75_dark_primitive_water_ri: Pol loyo (75%). Macol, macon, opoŋ ki pii. Ginoŋogi i kor ma woko.
acholi.stony_17_lighter_made_of_silicate_mine: Me kidi (17%). Yot loyo, gicweyo ki silicate + nyonyo. Ginoŋogi i kor ma iye.
acholi.metal_rich_8_mostly_iron_nickel_possib: Opoŋ ki nyonyo (8%). Dwoŋ mere nyonyo + nickel. Gwok a ki i cwiny pa protoplanet ma otur. Ka ma kunyo mito.
acholi.light_from_380_000_years_after_the_big: Ryeny ma a ki i mwaka 380,000 i ŋe Big Bang. Apoka-poka matino aye nyig pa galaxy ducu.
acholi.temperature_fluctuations_of_0_0001_see: Apoka-poka me lyeto ma cok 0.001% — nyig pa jami ducu
acholi.the_cmb_is_leftover_light_from_380_000: CMB obedo ryeny ma odoŋ ki i mwaka 380,000 i ŋe Big Bang. Apoka-poka matino me lyeto nyuto ka ma jami onoŋo tek manok iye. Kabedo ma tek magi aye odongo odoko galaxy + lakalatwe ducu ma waneno tin. Penzias + Wilson gunoŋo pa kore i 1965 (Nobel Prize 1978).
acholi.saturn_s_rings_are_99_water_ice_in_tri: Piny pa Saturn obedo 99% pee me pii i nucu trilion mapol. Gwok gitye ki milion mwaka 100 keken.
acholi.saturn_s_rings_are_mostly_water_ice_pa: Piny pa Saturn dwoŋ mere obedo nyig pee me pii ma cakke ki buru o i nyig ma rom ki ot. Lac mere km 282,000 ento dwoŋ mere pe romo km 1. Gwok ocweyo ki dwe ma otur i milion mwaka ~100 mukato — nyen mada!
acholi.pick_a_core_surface_atmosphere_and_lif: Yer cwiny, wi ngom, yamo, ki kwo. Nen kit me lobo ma iyubo.
acholi.pulsars_are_spinning_neutron_stars_wit: Pulsar gin neutron star ma wiro ma tye ki ryeny me magnet. Lobo neno mil keken ka ryeny okato.
acholi.a_pulsar_is_a_rapidly_rotating_neutron: Pulsar obedo neutron star ma wiro oyot twatwal. Tuŋ mere me magnet cwalo ryeny me radiation. Waneno mil keken ka ryeny okato i komwa — calo lamp me nam. Mukene mil tyen 700 i cekonde acel. Jocelyn Bell Burnell onoŋo mukwoŋo i 1967.
acholi.stream_of_charged_particles_from_sun_h: Mol pa jami ma tye ki charge ma a ki i Ceŋ, ma goyo Lobo. Yamo matek loyo = aurora mapol + peko i GPS.
acholi.solar_wind_is_a_stream_of_charged_part: Yamo me ceŋ obedo mol pa jami ma tye ki charge (dwoŋ mere proton + electron) ma mol ki i Ceŋ kare ducu. Yot mere lokke i kin 250-800 km/s. Rumo matek kelo aurora + twero balo GPS + laŋo me mac. Gin ma otimme i Carrington i 1859: telegraph opyet ci owaŋ.
acholi.iss_orbital_position: 🛰 Ka ma ISS Tye iye i Wir
acholi.the_iss_orbits_earth_every_90_minutes_: ISS wiro i kom Lobo i dakika 90 acel acel. Kare mukene tye i ceŋ, kare mukene tye i tipo pa Lobo.
acholi.the_iss_orbits_400_km_up_at_17_500_mph: ISS wiro i bor pa km 400 i yot pa 17,500 mph (28,000 km/h). Tyeko wir acel i dakika 90 — mumiyo luwot me polo gineno wok pa ceŋ + poto pa ceŋ tyen 16 i nino acel. ISS obedo gin madit loyo ma dano gugedo i polo.
acholi.voyager_position_tracker: 🚀 Lalub me Ka ma Voyager Tye iye
acholi.voyager_1_2_launched_1977_they_are_now: Voyager 1 + 2 gucwalogi i 1977. Kombeddi gitye i polo ma i kin lakalatwe; Voyager 1 okato heliopause i 2012 dok Voyager 2 i 2018.
acholi.voyagers_1_2_launched_1977_to_study_ou: Gucwalo Voyager 1 + 2 i 1977 me kwano planet ma woko. Gin aryo ducu gukato heliopause (aguu pa yamo me ceŋ) i 2012 + 2018 — kombeddi gitye i polo ma i kin lakalatwe. Acel acel tero Golden Record ki mot + wer pi jami mo keken ma nongogi.
acholi.mercury_passes_in_front_of_the_sun_eve: Mercury kato i nyim Ceŋ i kin mwaka manok. Nen ka kato — ento ki solar filter maber keken.
acholi.watch_with_proper_solar_filter_only_ne: Nen ki solar filter MABER keken — PE inen tir ki waŋi!
acholi.a_transit_happens_when_mercury_or_venu: Kato timme ka Mercury (onyo Venus) kato i kin Lobo + Ceŋ. Nen calo waŋ macol matidi i kom Ceŋ. Kato pa Mercury ma bino: Nowembe 13, 2032. Kato pa Venus ma bino: Dicembe 2117 — pe bidwogo doki nio wa 2125.
acholi.l_on_foucault_1851_proved_earth_rotate: Léon Foucault i 1851 onyuto ni Lobo wiro ki pendulum madit. Kit ma yeŋo iye lokke yot loyo i tuŋ malo ki piny.
acholi.l_on_foucault_1851_demonstrated_earth_: Léon Foucault i 1851 onyuto wir pa Lobo ki pendulum madit. Kabedo ma yeŋo iye nen calo wiro pien Lobo wiro i te. I tuŋ malo ki piny: cawa 24. I dye kor lobo: matwal pe. I Maine: cawa ~34.
acholi.saturn_s_north_pole_has_a_perfect_hexa: Tuŋ acam pa Saturn tye ki rumo ma tye ki nget abicel ma lac mere km 30,000. Voyager onoŋo i 1981.
acholi.saturn_s_hexagonal_pole_storm: Rumo me Nget Abicel i Tuŋ pa Saturn
acholi.persistent_feature_30_000_km_wide_5_ea: Gin ma pe rwenyo ma lac mere km 30,000 — kato tyen 2 loyo lac pa Lobo
acholi.saturn_has_a_perfect_hexagonal_storm_a: Saturn tye ki rumo ma nget abicel opore i tuŋ acam mere — Voyager aye ogamo cal mere mukwoŋo (1981), ci Cassini omoko ada. Nget abicel-li lac mere km 30,000 dok pe rwenyo. Piŋo nget abicel? Kit pa jet stream i yamo + Rossby wave.
acholi.the_original_clock_as_the_sun_arcs_acr: Cawa mukwoŋo. Macalo Ceŋ kato i polo, gnomon poyo tipo ma wiro ma nyuto cawa.
acholi.sundials_predate_clocks_by_millennia_a: Cawa me ceŋ obedo con loyo cawa me nyonyo pi mwaka alip mapol. Macalo Ceŋ wot i polo, tipo pa gnomon wiro. Jo Ejipt macon, Girik, Roma, ki Cayina ducu gugedo cawa me ceŋ ma opore. Mega me tin myero olok pi daylight saving time + equation of time.
acholi.80_galaxies_span_10_million_light_year: Galaxy 80 gitye i kin milion mwaka me ryeny 10 ma orumo wa. Milky Way + Andromeda gitwero goro i cok bilion mwaka 4-5 — kwan me 2025 waco ni tye i cok 50/50.
acholi.2_5_mly_away_heading_toward_us: Bor pa Mly 2.5 — bino cok kacekwa!
acholi.local_group_80_galaxies_in_10_million_: Local Group — galaxy ~80 i kin milion mwaka me ryeny 10
acholi.our_local_group_has_80_galaxies_domina: Local Group megwa tye ki galaxy ~80 ma Milky Way + Andromeda aye dongo loyo. Andromeda bino cok ki yot pa 110 km/s — goro twero timme i cok bilion mwaka 4-5. Ka otimme: galaxy madit me Milkomeda.
acholi.asteroid_impact_outcomes: ☄ Gin ma Timme ka Asteroid Ogoyo
acholi.what_size_asteroid_kills_which_level_o: Asteroid ma dit adi aye neko kwo me kit mene? Pim ki i nyig kidi o i ma oneko dinosaur.
acholi.atmospheric_entry_destroys_most_rocks_: Donyo i yamo balo kidi mapol ma nok loyo 5m. Chelyabinsk i 2013 (20m) oturo dirica ento bur pe. Tunguska i 1908 (50m) opodo yat i km² 2000. Chicxulub i Ma 66 (10km) oneko dinosaur.
acholi.a_cme_blasts_billions_of_tons_of_plasm: CME cwalo ton bilion mapol me plasma ki i Ceŋ. Nino manok ka doŋ okato, twero kelo aurora maber + peko i GPS.
acholi.a_coronal_mass_ejection_blasts_billion: Coronal Mass Ejection cwalo ton bilion mapol me plasma i polo ki yot pa milion mph 1-2. Tero nino 1-5 me oo i Lobo. CME matek kelo rumo me geomagnetic, aurora ma ryeny, dok twero balo satellite + laŋo me mac.
acholi.cepheids_pulse_on_a_regular_cycle_thei: Cepheid mil i kare ma opore. Kare mere nyuto ryeny mere ada — lapim pa polo.
acholi.cepheid_variables_pulse_on_a_regular_c: Cepheid mil i kare ma opore. Kare mere rwatte tir ki ryeny mere ada (Henrietta Leavitt 1908). Lupwony me lakalatwe pimo kare-ni + gitiyo kwede me ŋeyo ryeny ada + bor.
acholi.comet_orbit_drawer: ☄ Lagoyo Yo me Wir pa Comet
acholi.orbits_range_from_circles_to_long_elli: Yo me wir cakke ki ryeŋryeŋ o i ellipse mabor. Lok eccentricity me goyo yo ma cal ki planet onyo ma cal ki comet.
acholi.orbital_eccentricity_goes_from_0_perfe: Eccentricity me yo me wir cakke ki 0 (ryeŋryeŋ ma opore) o i 1 (parabolic ma a woko). Planet cok ryeŋryeŋ. Comet cal ki toŋ twatwal — gicito cok ki Ceŋ + bor i kabedo ma woko. Yo me wir me hyperbolic (e>1) nyuto kato tyen acel keken i solar system.
acholi.earth_s_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelen: Yamo pa Lobo gengo wavelength mapol. Ryeny ma wanen, radio, ki dirica mukene me infrared aye oo i ŋom.
acholi.visible_light_radio_waves_penetrate_th: ✔ Ryeny ma wanen, wave me radio, ki infrared mukene oo i ŋom
acholi.earth_atmosphere_blocks_most_wavelengt: Yamo pa Lobo gengo wavelength mapol. Ryeny ma wanen, radio, ki dirica mukene me infrared oo i ŋom; UV, X-ray, gamma-ray, ki infrared mapol mito telescope ma tye i polo calo Hubble, JWST, Chandra, ki Fermi.
acholi.spectra_reveal_temperature_composition_m: Spectra nyuto lyeto, jami ma cweyo, wot, ki lanyut me kit ma gin-nu tye iye i dongo mere.
acholi.cool_giant_atmosphere_4000_k: Yamo pa lakalatwe madit ma ŋic: cok 4,000 K
acholi.excited_gas_10000_k: Gas ma otuko: pol kare cok 10,000 K
acholi.broad_line_spectrum: Spectrum ma tye ki laŋo malac
acholi.expanding_ejecta_thousands_km_s: Jami ma tye ka dongo woko: alip me km/s
acholi.spectral_line_strength_caution: Teko pa laŋo pe obedo lapim ma yot me dwoŋ pa jami: lyeto, dwoŋ, ki ionization bene keto lanyut mene aye nen matek loyo. Kit magi gin model me pwony ma giyot.
acholi.spectra_life_paths_note: Labol magi pe gin kare acel: lakalatwe ma cal ki Ceŋ twero doko red giant ki planetary nebula, ka supernova me Kit II tyeko kwo pa lakalatwe ma pek.
acholi.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_watch_when_i: Lobo wiro 15° i cawa acel acel. Nen ka ma dyeceŋ tye i Tokyo, ki ka ma ceŋ wok i Portland.
acholi.earth_rotates_15_per_hour_utc_coordina: Lobo wiro 15° i cawa acel acel. UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) obedo kare ma lobo ducu tiyo kwede. Kare pa kabedo mapatpat lokke ki ±cawa. Portland me Maine tye i UTC-5 (EST) onyo UTC-4 (EDT). I lobo ducu, nucce acel me Lobo tye i dyeceŋ ka nucce mukene tye i dyewor.
acholi.mind_blowing_facts_gallery: 💡 Ka me Lok ma Uro Dano
acholi.click_through_12_astronomy_facts_that_: Dii wek ikwan lok 12 me astronomy ma kalo tam pa dano.
acholi.textbook_diagrams_lie_the_moon_is_much: Cal ma tye i buk goba. Dwe tye ka bor twatwal loyo kit ma gigoyo. Nen rom ada.
acholi.most_textbooks_draw_the_moon_too_big_t: Buk mapol gigoyo Dwe ma dit twal + cok twal. Ada: lac pa Dwe obedo 1/4 pa mega me Lobo, dok bor o i Dwe obedo cok lac pa Lobo tyen 30. Ryeny tero cekonde 1.3 me wot-ti.
acholi.jupiter_has_the_shortest_day_10_hr_ven: Jupiter tye ki nino ma cek loyo (cawa 10). Venus tye ki ma bor loyo (nino 243 me Lobo!).
acholi.day_length_across_the_solar_system_log: Bor pa nino i Solar System (i rom me log)
acholi.jupiter_spins_fast_venus_rotates_slowe: Jupiter wiro oyot. Venus wiro mot loyo mwaka mere.
acholi.gas_giants_spin_fast_because_of_how_th: Gas giant wiro oyot pi kit ma gicweyogi kwede. Venus wiro mot loyo, gwok pi kwot me ceŋ + yamo mere ma dwoŋ. Lobo dwoko mot ki ~milisecond 1.7 i mia me mwaka acel acel pi gravity pa Dwe.
acholi.eclipse_path_maker: 🗺 Lagedo Yo pa Kop me Ceŋ
acholi.total_eclipses_cover_narrow_strips_the: Kop ma opoŋ liweŋ umo laŋo manok. Yo me kop me 2024 okato i tuŋ acam me Maine.
acholi.april_8_2024_total_solar_eclipse_path: Yo pa Kop me Ceŋ ma Opoŋ i Apiri 8, 2024
acholi.total_solar_eclipses_only_happen_along: Kop me ceŋ ma opoŋ liweŋ timme keken i yo manok ma lac mere ~km 100-150. Kop me Apiri 8, 2024 okato i tuŋ acam me Maine — jo mapol me Maine guwoto tuŋ acam me neno kop ma opoŋ. Kop ma opoŋ me anyim ma ginene ki i Maine: Mei 1, 2079.
acholi.sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_13_8_billion_y: Kalenda me Polo pa Sagan: mwaka bilion 13.8 i mwaka acel. Dano gubino i cekonde me agiki.
acholi.carl_sagan_s_cosmic_calendar_compresse: Kalenda me Polo pa Carl Sagan: keto mwaka bilion 13.8 i mwaka 1. Big Bang = Jan 1. Kombeddi = Dec 31 dye wor. Dano gubino i cekonde me agiki. Dano ma gubedo ki loc gitye i nucu manok pa cekonde me agiki.
acholi.how_many_alien_civilizations_adjust_ea: Dano me polo mukene tye adi? Lok gin ma pe wangeyo acel acel + inen lagam.
acholi.in_our_milky_way_galaxy_at_any_time: i Galaxy megwa me Milky Way i kare mo keken
acholi.r_star_formation_rate: R: Yot me cweyo pa lakalatwe
acholi.fp_fraction_w_planets: fp: Nucu ma tye ki planet
acholi.ne_habitable_per_system: ne: Kwan me planet ma kwo romo bedo iye i kit acel acel
acholi.fl_fraction_with_life: fl: Nucu ma tye ki kwo
acholi.fi_intelligent_life: fi: Kwo ma tye ki ryeko
acholi.frank_drake_1961_estimating_other_civi: Frank Drake i 1961: pimo dano me polo mukene. Jami mapol pe wangeyo — lagam cakke ki <1 (wan keken) o i milion. Nyuto gin ma pe wangeyo loyo miyo lagam. Wil slider wek inen kit ma lagam lokke kwede oyot.
acholi.world_telescopes_catalog: 🔭 Lok me Telescope pa Lobo Ducu
acholi.dozen_biggest_best_telescopes_hubble_j: Telescope apar wiye aryo ma dongo + maber loyo: Hubble, JWST, Keck, VLT, ALMA, ki gin ma gineno.
acholi.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_30_year_: Telescope me polo pa Optical/UV/IR. Otiyo mwaka 30+.
acholi.infrared_space_telescope_at_l2_lagrang: Telescope me polo pa infrared. Tye i Lagrange point me L2.
acholi.twin_10m_telescopes_on_mauna_kea_hawai: Telescope aryo ma rom me 10m i Mauna Kea, Hawaii.
acholi.eso_chile_four_8_2m_telescopes: ESO Chile, telescope angwen ma rom me 8.2m.
acholi.twin_8m_mauna_kea_cerro_pach_n: Aryo ma rom me 8m: Mauna Kea + Cerro Pachón.
acholi.66_antenna_radio_array_chilean_desert: Antenna 66 me radio, i tim me Chile.
acholi.optical_uv_ir_space_telescope_still_op: Telescope me polo pa Optical/UV/IR. Pud tiyo.
acholi.nasa_x_ray_space_telescope: Telescope me polo pa X-ray me NASA.
acholi.infrared_space_telescope_retired_2020: Telescope me polo pa infrared, oyweyo i 2020.
acholi.japanese_8_2m_on_mauna_kea: Mega pa Japan ma rom me 8.2m i Mauna Kea.
acholi.future_radio_telescope_australia_s_afr: Telescope me radio me anyim, Australia + Africa ma tuŋ acuc.
acholi.coming_39m_eso_telescope_chile: Telescope me ESO ma rom me 39m ma bino. Chile.
acholi.a_dozen_of_the_world_s_most_powerful_t: Telescope apar wiye aryo ma tek loyo i lobo ducu. Aperture (cm) obedo lac pa mirror madit. Aperture madit = ryeny mapol + jami matino ma nen maber. Telescope ma tye i polo weko peko pa yamo.
acholi.star_lifespan_calculator: ⏳ Lakwan me Bor pa Kwo pa Lakalatwe
acholi.massive_stars_live_fast_die_young_adju: Lakalatwe ma pek kwo oyot + to nyen. Lok pek + inen kare ma lakalatwe waŋo iye.
acholi.massive_stars_burn_fuel_fast_lifespan_: Lakalatwe ma pek waŋo cam mere oyot. Bor pa kwo ∝ M^-2.5. Ceŋ: 10 Gyr (watye i dye). 10 M☉: 30 Myr keken. Red dwarf me 0.1 M☉: trilion mwaka.
acholi.track_your_progress_planets_explored_p: Lub kit ma icito kwede: planet ma iyenyo, wel ma inoŋo, tic ma icoyo.
acholi.this_tool_features_35_interactive_mini: Gin tic man tye ki tuko matino 35+ ma kwako astronomy, physics, ki yeny. Ki i cweyo pa black hole o i kwat me lor i Dwe, itwero yeny Solar System ki gin ma kato.
acholi.astronomy_hall_of_fame: 👨‍🚀 Ka pa Jo ma Pire Tek i Astronomy
acholi.16_milestones_from_ancient_greek_astro: Jami 16 madongo ki i astronomy pa Girik macon o i JWST. Nyiŋ ma myero iŋe.
acholi.a_2300_year_journey_from_aristarchus_t: Wot me mwaka 2300 ki i Aristarchus o i JWST. Ginoŋo acel acel ojenge i mukene. Kwan obedo ryeny me acut — lapwony me lakalatwe acel acel cuŋ i wi gaŋ pa jo ma con.
acholi.compare_spectral_classes_temperature_fin: Pim kit pa lyeto pa wi ngom ki lanyut me spectral ma nyuto gin.
acholi.spectral_class_size_caution: Giketo dit pa nyig ryeŋryeŋ marom pi tam. Kit me spectral tito lyeto ki kit pa laŋo, pe bor pa dyere onyo ryeny kene; kit me ryeny ma V nyuto main sequence, III nyuto ma dit, dok I nyuto ma dit twal.
acholi.m_class_dwarf_supergiant_note: Nyukuta acel-lu twero kwako lakalatwe ma pat twatwal: Proxima Centauri obedo M dwarf, ka Betelgeuse obedo M supergiant. Ceŋ obedo G2 V.
acholi.mars_vs_earth_atmosphere: 🌐 Yamo pa Mars ka Ipimo ki Lobo
acholi.mars_has_100_thinner_air_made_of_mostl: Mars tye ki yamo ma nok tyen 100 ma dwoŋ mere CO₂. Pim jami ma cweyo gas + dieny.
acholi.mars_atmosphere_is_100_thinner_than_ea: Yamo pa Mars nok tyen 100 loyo mega me Lobo. Jami ma cweyo: 95% CO₂. Me yweyo i Mars imito oxygen + dieny ma dwoŋ tyen 100. Nitrogen cok pe tye pi pito jami.
acholi.10_essential_black_hole_terms_event_ho: Lok 10 madongo me black hole: event horizon, singularity, spaghettification, Hawking radiation.
acholi.event_horizon_telescope_captured_first: Event Horizon Telescope ogamo cal mukwoŋo pa black hole me M87* (2019) + Sgr A* (2022). Piny ma orange = ryeny ma okuk orumo apwol macol ka ma ryeny pe twero a woko.
acholi.five_planets_have_auroras_earth_s_is_g: Planet abic tye ki aurora. Mega me Lobo nyagilic/kwar, mega me Jupiter tek loyo, mega me Mars onyware.
acholi.green_oxygen_red_atomic_o_blue_nitroge: Nyagilic (oxygen) + kwar (atomic O) + bulu (nitrogen). Nen maber cok ki tuŋ pa magnet.
acholi.most_powerful_in_solar_system_driven_b: Tek loyo i solar system. Got mac pa Io + teko me magnet pa Jupiter aye miyo. Aurora me UV ma pe rwenyo.
acholi.powered_by_solar_wind_less_colorful_th: Yamo me ceŋ aye miyo. Rangi mere nok loyo mega me Lobo ento dit twatwal. Bedo pi nino mapol.
acholi.strange_orientation_due_to_98_axial_ti: Kite pat pi jengo me 98° pa kome. Tek me gamo cal mere.
acholi.weak_no_global_magnetic_field_auroras_: Nok — teko me magnet pe i kom ducu. Aurora rumo kabedo ma pud tye ki magnet i del.
acholi.famous_space_missions: 🚀 Tic me Polo ma Pire Tek
acholi.10_missions_that_defined_planetary_exp: Tic 10 ma oketo yo me yeny pa planet. Ki i Apollo o i Cassini o i JWST.
acholi.first_mars_landers_life_experiments: Yeya mukwoŋo ma olor i Mars + tem me nono kwo
acholi.20_years_of_saturn_titan_exploration: Mwaka 20 me yeny pa Saturn + Titan
acholi.nuclear_powered_rover_still_active: Rover ma nuclear aye miyo teko, pud tiyo
acholi.first_close_up_of_pluto_arrokoth: Cal mukwoŋo ma cok pa Pluto + Arrokoth
acholi.replaced_hubble_for_infrared_deep_fiel: Medo i kom Hubble ki deep field me infrared
acholi.brightness_counts_backward_smaller_bri: Kwan me ryeny cito ka ŋeye: matidi = ryeny loyo. Ma wanen kwako magnitude 60.
acholi.faintest_naked_eye: Ma ryeny nok loyo ma waŋ dano neno
acholi.magnitudes_count_backward_smaller_brig: Magnitude kwane KA ŊEYE: matidi = ryeny loyo. Kit acel acel me 5 = ryeny tyen 100 loyo. Hipparchus ocweyo i 130 BCE. Ceŋ: -26.7. JWST neno o i mag 34. Aguu mere: 100^((34-(-26))/5) ≈ tyen 10^24 ma ryeny nok loyo Ceŋ.
acholi.four_ways_astronomers_describe_positio: Yo angwen ma lupwony me lakalatwe gitito kwede kabedo i polo.
acholi.star_fixed_coordinates_right_ascension: Coordinate ma jenge i lakalatwe. Right ascension (h:m:s) + Declination (°). Gitiyo kwede i buk me lakalatwe.
acholi.observer_centered_altitude_above_horiz: Ma jenge i laneno. Altitude (malo ki aguu me neno) + Azimuth (ki tuŋ acam). Gitiyo kwede me cimo telescope.
acholi.centered_on_sun_earth_plane_used_for_s: Ma jenge i laŋo pa Ceŋ-Lobo. Gitiyo kwede pi jami me solar system.
acholi.centered_on_milky_way_plane_used_for_g: Ma jenge i laŋo pa Milky Way. Gitiyo kwede pi kwan me galaxy.
acholi.astronomers_use_multiple_coordinate_sy: Lupwony me lakalatwe gitiyo ki kit me coordinate mapol. Equatorial obedo me lobo ducu dok jami gwoko coordinate acel-lu kadi bed Lobo wiro. Alt-Az lokke kare ducu macalo Lobo wiro. Galactic ber loyo pi kwano kit pa Milky Way.
acholi.from_1_sun_to_10_22_stars_the_scale_of: Ki i Ceŋ 1 o i lakalatwe 10^22. Rom pa polo lworo dano.
acholi.astronomy_operates_on_absurd_scales_ho: Astronomy tiyo ki rom ma tek niaŋ. "Lakalatwe tye adi?" — pol loyo kweyo ma tye i te nam ducu i Lobo. "Teggi adi?" — mwaka bilion 13.8. Ento wel mukene (two pa black hole) dit loyo bene.
acholi.36_500_objects_orbit_earth_at_various_: Jami 36,500 wiro i kom Lobo i bor mapatpat. Wil slider me bor malo wek inen gin ma tye iye.
acholi.36_500_tracked_objects_millions_of_fra: Jami 36,500 ma gilubo + nucu milion mapol wiro i kom Lobo. Peko me Kessler Syndrome: goro ma lubbe ma miyo polo doko ka ma pe konyo. SpaceX Starlink tye ki satellite 5000+; gitye ka yubu mapol mukene.
acholi.every_culture_sees_stories_in_the_star: Kaka acel acel neno ododo i lakalatwe. Ki i lutic pa Girik o i Emu i Polo pa jo Aborijini.
acholi.stories_projected_onto_stars_by_cultur: Ododo ma dano me lobo ducu guketo i kom lakalatwe. Emu i Polo pa jo Aborijini me Australia tiyo ki pol macol me buru. Lutel me wot pa Polynesia gitiyo ki lakalatwe me telo yo i Pacific ki wic keken. Astronomy bene obedo tito ododo.
acholi.5_ways_astronomers_find_planets_around: Yo 5 ma lupwony me lakalatwe ginoŋo kwede planet i kom lakalatwe mukene. Transit + Doppler aye dongo loyo.
acholi.watch_a_star_and_look_for_tiny_brightn: Nen lakalatwe ci iyeny ka ryeny mere dwoko piny manok ka planet kato i nyime. Kepler + TESS gitiyo kwede.
acholi.a_planet_s_gravity_makes_its_star_wobb: Gravity pa planet miyo lakalatwe mere yeŋŋe. Waneno yeŋŋe-ni calo Doppler shift i ryeny pa lakalatwe.
acholi.gravity_of_a_passing_star_planet_bends: Gravity pa lakalatwe+planet ma kato kuko ryeny ma a ki i lakalatwe ma bor loyo. Pe jenge i bor.
acholi.block_out_the_star_s_light_photograph_: Geŋo ryeny pa lakalatwe + gamo cal pa planet ma cok. Nio wa kombeddi tiyo keken pi planet madongo/ma bor.
acholi.variations_in_pulsar_pulses_reveal_orb: Alokaloka i mil pa pulsar nyuto jami ma wiro i kome. Exoplanet mukwoŋo ginoŋo ki yo man (1992).
acholi.first_exoplanet_around_a_sun_like_star: Exoplanet mukwoŋo i kom lakalatwe ma cal ki Ceŋ: 51 Pegasi b (1995). Kombeddi gimoko ada 6,300+. JWST tye ka tiyo spectroscopy me yamo i kom exoplanet — ka yenyo biosignature.
acholi.schedule_of_eclipses_2024_2079_maine_s: Kare me kop 2024-2079. Kop me ceŋ ma opoŋ ma bino i Maine: 2079.
acholi.total_solar_eclipses_are_rare_about_2_: Kop me ceŋ ma opoŋ liweŋ pe timme pol. Cok acel i dwe 18 ka mo keken i Lobo, ento acel acel ginene keken ki i yo manok. Kop me dwe ginene i tuŋ me dyewor ducu.
acholi.hubble_s_classification_spirals_ellipt: Poko pa Hubble: spiral, elliptical, irregular + jami ducu ma i kingi.
acholi.tight_arms_big_central_bulge: Bad ma ocok, kudo madit i dyere
acholi.edwin_hubble_classified_galaxies_in_19: Edwin Hubble opoko galaxy i 1936 — "Hubble tuning fork." Spiral + elliptical + irregular. Galaxy dongo ki ribbe — Milky Way tye i dye kwo mere; ribbe ki Andromeda twero bino i bilion mwaka mapol (kwan me 2025 waco ni tye i cok 50/50).
acholi.from_walking_to_light_speed_log_scale_: Ki i wot me tyen o i yot pa ryeny (i rom me log). Voyager 1 obedo gin ma dano ocweyo ma bor loyo dok acel i kin probe wa ma yot loyo ma cito woko, ento pud mot twatwal ka ipimo ki polo.
acholi.voyager_1_is_the_fastest_object_humans: Voyager 1 yot ka ipimo ki yeya me polo mukene dok kombeddi obedo gin ma dano ocweyo ma bor loyo, ento pud tero cok mwaka 80,000 me oo i lakalatwe ma cok loyo. Ryeny tyeko wot acel-lu i mwaka 4.
acholi.star_forming_region: ✨ Kabedo ka ma Lakalatwe Cweyo iye
acholi.watch_stars_form_from_cold_dust_to_hot: Nen kit ma lakalatwe cweyo kwede ki i buru ma ŋic o i ceŋ ma lyet. Kit 6 i kin milion mwaka manok.
acholi.stars_are_born_in_clusters_from_giant_: Ginywalo lakalatwe i kal ki i pol madongo me molecule. Tic ducu: milion mwaka manok. Labol ma gingeyo: Orion Nebula (M42), Eagle Nebula (Pillars of Creation), Tarantula Nebula.
acholi.10_of_the_deepest_open_questions_in_co: Apeny 10 ma tut loyo ma pud tye ayaba i cosmology. Mukene tye ki lagam manok; mukene pe wangeyo matwal.
acholi.quick_table_of_planet_properties_diame: Tebul ma yot me jami pa planet. Lac, gravity, bor pa nino, dwe.
acholi.side_by_side_comparison_of_key_planet_: Pim ma nget ki nget pa jami madongo pa planet. Lobo = te lok. Ceŋ dit cok tyen 109 loyo lac pa Lobo (kato tyen milion i dit mere). Jupiter tye ki dwe 115 ma gingeyo. Venus wiro mot twatwal ma nino mere kato mwaka mere.
acholi.about_this_tool: 🌌 Lok i kom Gin Tic Man
acholi.40_visual_interactive_mini_tools_made_: Tuko matino 40+ ma inen + ma itiyo kwede. Gicweyo pi lukwan ma penyo + dano madongo.
acholi.40_interactive_mini_tools_svg_visualiz: Tuko matino 40+, cal me SVG, ki simulation me pwony.
acholi.from_a_moon_phase_dial_to_a_black_hole: Ki i dial me kit pa dwe o i lanyut me black hole o i pendulum pa Foucault, gin tic acel acel gicweyo me miyo tam ma tek niaŋ doko ma inyalo winyo + tuko kwede.
acholi.built_for_k_12_curious_adults_open_all: Gicweyo pi K-12 + dano madongo ma penyo. Yab gin tic ducu, onyo acel keken — acel acel tiyo kene.
acholi.part_of_alloflow_stem_lab_built_in_mai: Nucu pa AlloFlow STEM Lab. Gicweyo i Maine, USA. Jami ducu a ki i NASA, ESA, JAXA, USGS, IAU + ka me kwan ma dano ducu twero neno. Tic me pwony obedo nono.
acholi.9_annual_meteor_showers_their_best_vie: Kot me meteor 9 me mwaka acel acel + nino ma ber loyo me neno. Ket i kalenda meri.
acholi.meteor_showers_happen_when_earth_cross: Kot me meteor timme ka Lobo kato i yugi ma comet oweko. Ka maber me neno: kabedo macol, Dwe pe, i ŋe dye wor. Perseid + Geminid gin kot ma bino ada mwaka ki mwaka.
acholi.famous_astronomy_quotes: 💬 Lok ma Pire Tek me Astronomy
acholi.10_quotes_from_astronomers_space_trave: Lok 10 ki bot lupwony me lakalatwe + luwot me polo ma nyuto uro.
acholi.tonight_sky_observing_guide: 🔭 Lakony me Neno Polo Tin Dyewor
acholi.10_things_you_can_spot_tonight_with_ju: Jami 10 ma itwero neno tin dyewor ki waŋi keken onyo ki binocular.
acholi.best_naked_eye_observing_dark_site_awa: Neno maber ki waŋ dano: kabedo macol (ka bor ki mac me gaŋ), Dwe i te aguu me neno, waŋi orwatte (dakika 20-30 i colpiny). App ma nono: Stellarium, SkyView, Star Walk konyo me ŋiyo gin ma ineno.
acholi.carl_sagan_s_most_quoted_reflection_a_: Tam pa Carl Sagan ma dano gikwano loyo. Nyig acel ma tye ki dano ducu ma wangeyo.
acholi.from_this_distant_vantage_point_the_ea: "Ki i kabedo man ma bor, Lobo twero nen calo pe tye ki pire mo. Ento bot wan, tye pat. Tam doki i kom nyig-gi. Mano en kany. Mano en gaŋwa. Mano en wan. I komme dano ducu ma imaro, dano ducu ma iŋeyo, dano ducu ma dong iwinyo pi kome, dano ducu ma gubedo, gukwo kwo gi."
acholi.voyager_1_took_this_photo_of_earth_fro: Voyager 1 ogamo cal man pa Lobo ki i bor pa bilion km 6 i Feb 14, 1990 — Carl Sagan aye okwayo. Lobo obedo pixel acel. Dano ducu ma gukwo i lobo gubedo i pixel-li.
acholi.8_iconic_deep_sky_objects_star_nurseri: Jami 8 ma tye tut i polo ma gingeyo. Ka ma lakalatwe nywalle iye, del pa lakalatwe ma to, jami ma odoŋ ki i supernova.
acholi.stellar_nursery_24_ly_across_visible_n: Ka ma lakalatwe nywalle iye ma lac mere ly 24. Waŋ dano neno i Pala pa Orion.
acholi.remains_of_supernova_witnessed_in_1054: Gin ma odoŋ ki i supernova ma dano guneno i 1054 CE. Tye ki pulsar.
acholi.planetary_nebula_in_lyra_glowing_shell: Planetary nebula i Lyra. Del ma ryeny ma a ki i lakalatwe ma cal ki Ceŋ ma tye ka to.
acholi.home_of_pillars_of_creation_hubble_199: Ka pa Pillars of Creation (Hubble 1995). Kor ka ma lakalatwe cweyo iye.
acholi.complex_planetary_nebula_many_shell_la: Planetary nebula ma tek niaŋ. Kor mapol me del ma a ki i mil.
acholi.closest_planetary_nebula_looks_like_an: Planetary nebula ma cok loyo. Nen calo waŋ i polo.
acholi.in_large_magellanic_cloud_largest_know: I Large Magellanic Cloud. Kabedo madit loyo ma gingeyo ka ma lakalatwe cweyo iye.
acholi.supernova_remnant_8000_years_old_massi: Gin ma odoŋ ki i supernova ma tye ki mwaka ~8000. Lany madongo i Cygnus.
acholi.what_you_need_to_start_observing_from_: Gin ma imito me cako neno — ki i app ma nono o i telescope ma opore ki wel meri.
acholi.free_planetarium_software_shows_night_: Software me planetarium ma nono. Nyuto polo me dyewor ki kabedo mo keken, kare mo keken.
acholi.phone_app_point_at_sky_to_identify_wha: App me cim. Cim i polo wek iŋiny gin ma ineno.
acholi.interactive_3d_solar_system_jwst_missi: Solar system me 3D + JWST + cal me tic ma itiyo kwede.
acholi.best_starter_scope_reveals_galilean_mo: Gin ma ber loyo me cako. Nyuto dwe pa Jupiter ma Galileo onoŋo, Andromeda, kal me Pleiades.
acholi.celestron_starsense_explorer_102_or_or: Celestron StarSense Explorer 102 onyo Orion 4.5" Newtonian.
acholi.celestron_nexstar_8se_or_apertura_ad8_: Celestron NexStar 8SE onyo Apertura AD8 Dobsonian.
acholi.most_cities_have_one_members_lend_scop: Gaŋi mapol tye ki acel. Lubunge giholo telescope, gipwonyo, dok gicweyo nyim me neno lakalatwe.
acholi.drive_30_min_from_city_lights_maine_is: Kwat dakika 30+ ka bor ki mac me gaŋ. Maine opoŋ ki gin magi. Katahdin Woods and Waters obedo kabedo ma gimoko ni polo mere col.
acholi.most_important_tool_dark_sky_light_pol: Gin ma pire tek loyo: polo macol. Mac ma pol tyeko lakalatwe 90%. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM ki AMC Maine Woods gin kabedo me International Dark Sky ma gimoko; Acadia ki Baxter bene gitye ki polo macol maber twatwal.
acholi.star_s_fate_depends_on_mass_brown_dwar: Agikki pa lakalatwe jenge i pek mere: brown dwarf, white dwarf, neutron star, onyo black hole.
acholi.how_a_star_dies_depends_almost_entirel: Kit ma lakalatwe to kwede jenge dwoŋ mere i pek mere ma ocakke kwede. Aguu ma tye i kin neutron star + black hole pe gimoko ada (aguu me Tolman-Oppenheimer-Volkoff ~2-3 M☉ pi gin ma odoŋ).
acholi.from_1km_to_93_billion_light_years_ref: Ki i km 1 o i bilion mwaka me ryeny 93. Tebul me rom pa polo.
acholi.distances_jump_in_scale_km_to_au_to_ly: Bor kato oyot i rom: km o i AU o i ly o i bilion me ly. Kit acel acel dit tyen ~10,000-100,000. Astronomy kwo i rom me log.
acholi.maine_night_sky_by_season: 🌲 Polo me Dyewor i Maine i Kare acel acel
acholi.maine_has_world_class_dark_skies_what_: Maine tye ki polo macol maber twatwal i lobo ducu. Gin ma myero iyeny i kare acel acel.
acholi.maine_has_fantastic_dark_skies_especia: Maine tye ki polo macol maber twatwal — loyo ka i tuŋ acam me gaŋi madongo. Katahdin Woods and Waters NM ki AMC Maine Woods gin kabedo me International Dark Sky ma gimoko; Acadia, Allagash, Baxter, ki Cobscook bene col maber. Dyewor me kare me koyo bor + leŋ twatwal.
acholi.major_space_missions_events_2024_2027_: Tic ki gin ma otimme madongo i polo 2024-2027. Watye i kare ma mit.
acholi.space_exploration_is_in_a_renaissance_: Yeny pa polo tye ka nyen doki. Lobo manyen (India, Japan, UAE), kampany manyen (SpaceX, Blue Origin), tic manyen (Europa Clipper, Artemis, JWST). Ket waŋi malo — dok ket cwinyi iye.
acholi.quick_reference_summary_of_solar_syste: Lok ma yot ma tito jami ma tye i solar system + kit ma pek opoke kwede.
acholi.the_sun_contains_99_86_of_all_solar_sy: Ceŋ tye ki 99.86% pa pek ducu me solar system. Jupiter tero nucu aryo pa 0.14% ma odoŋ. Lobo + jami mukene ducu aye odoŋ.
acholi.from_our_own_luna_to_triton_enceladus_: Ki i Luna mewa o i Triton + Enceladus. Mukene dit loyo Mercury.
acholi.most_spectacular_moons_in_the_solar_sy: Dwe ma leŋ loyo i solar system. Mapol dit loyo Pluto. Europa + Enceladus + Titan gitye ki nam i te del dok gin kabedo madongo pi kwan me astrobiology.
acholi.astronomers_report_everything_in_utc_t: Lupwony me lakalatwe gitito jami ducu i UTC. Tito pa kare pa kabedo.
acholi.utc_coordinated_universal_time_is_the_: UTC (Coordinated Universal Time) obedo kare ma lobo ducu tiyo kwede. Jenge i cawa me atom.
acholi.astronomers_report_events_in_utc_so_ob: Lupwony me lakalatwe gitito jami ma otimme i UTC wek ka me neno i lobo ducu guromo pimo. SpaceX cwalo rocket i UTC. Tic pa NASA tye i UTC.
acholi.maine_utc_5_est_or_utc_4_edt_london_ut: Maine: UTC-5 (EST) onyo UTC-4 (EDT). London: UTC+0 (GMT) onyo UTC+1 (BST). Japan: UTC+9.
acholi.tip_when_you_read_an_astronomy_event_t: Tam: ka ikwano kare pa jami me astronomy, rot kare ducu ka tye i UTC onyo i kare pa kabedo meri.
acholi.utc_replaced_gmt_in_1972_based_on_atom: UTC oleyo GMT i 1972. Jenge i cawa me atom i lab pa lobo ducu, ma gipimo dyere. Gimedo cekonde ka mite.
acholi.40_interactive_tools_to_explore_in_thi: Gin tic 40+ ma itwero yenyo i app man. Acel acel yabo dirica manyen i kom gin mo me polo.
acholi.astronomy_bucket_list: ✅ Lok me Jami me Polo ma Myero Itim
acholi.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo: Jami 15 me polo ma pire tek me lubo. Mapol gin nono + inyalo timogi.
acholi.15_cosmic_experiences_worth_chasing_mo_2: Jami 15 me polo ma pire tek me lubo. Mapol pe gimito wel mo, kare keken. Polo me dyewor pe kwayi gin mo — cit irwate kwede.

acholi.carl_sagan_frank_drake_linda_salzman_s: Carl Sagan + Frank Drake + Linda Salzman Sagan + jo mukene mapol aye guyubo gin magi. Bunge me Voyager Record obedo ki Ann Druyan — ma giketo wave pa wiye i record-di.
